title: Media Audit Reveals Flutterwave and MTN Nigeria Lead in Visibility Despite Nigeria’s Economic Struggles - FinancialEDGE
description: Despite Nigeria's prevailing economic difficulties, including heightened inflation and increasing operational costs, the fintech, telecommunications, and ride-hailing industries have maintained a robust media presence and public awareness footprint. This sustained success is attributed to strategic media relations, effective marketing campaigns, and the impressive data shared with the media during Q3 2024, which collectively bolstered public
